markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on performance, new priorities, and process updates.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Priorities:** DMI & ACL are top business priorities. "Boards" remains a high-value focus to prevent content decay.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Process Updates:** Two new checks will be added to the workflow: a site search for existing content before topic creation and a separate tab for commercial keywords in research docs.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Tool Migration:** GrowthX is migrating from Scrunch to its internal tool, CheckTat. A demo is set for Friday, and Diligent will likely migrate its account for data consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Performance:** Traffic is recovering from a seasonal dip and is on track to exceed 8k visits/month. Diligent's LLM presence remains strong.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Tooling

  - [**Traffic Recovery:** Traffic is recovering from a seasonal dip and is on track to exceed 8k visits/month.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Cohort Performance:** "Boards and Governance" remains the top-performing cohort.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**LLM Presence:** Diligent's LLM presence is strong.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
      - [**Note:** Metrics will change post-migration to CheckTat, as its calculation method is different.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [**CheckTat Migration:** GrowthX is migrating from Scrunch to its internal AI visibility tool, CheckTat.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Demo:** Friday sync.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Action:** Carrie to send the current competitor list for review.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Decision:** Diligent will likely migrate its account to maintain data consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### New Priorities & Topic Strategy

  - [**Topic Prioritization:** New business priorities (DMI, ACL, Vault) require re-prioritization of the topic list.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Priority Breakdown:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Top:** DMI, ACL.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [**High:** "Boards" (maintenance to prevent content decay).](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [**Lower:** "Vault" (lower volume, but content should be threaded throughout).](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Vault Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Issue:** Commercial keywords were assigned to blogs, not LPs.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Analysis was limited to blog production scope.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [**Solution:** Isolate commercial/BOFU keywords in a separate tab for LP optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**New Content Opportunities:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [**Comparison Content:** Now viable due to a clear legal path.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [**AI Info Page:** A text-heavy page for LLM training is a low-effort, high-potential experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

### Process & Workflow Updates

  - [**Internal Content Check:** A new check will be added to prevent content duplication and find internal linking opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX runs a site search before adding a topic to Airtable and again before production.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Handover Plan:** Vivek is creating an "operating manual" for the handover to Carrie, ensuring a smooth transition. Joe is also available for questions.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Automated Publishing:** GrowthX requested API access to automate publishing. Kezia will check feasibility with the web team.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

### Strategic Alignment

  - [**Product Heat Map:** Tyler's heat map for product prioritization will be data-driven.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [**GrowthX Input:** Will provide data on search volume and incremental lift.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [**Timeline:** GrowthX's BU-aligned reporting will be ready by month-end.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Request API access for automated publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Request a Loom demo of the DMI product for the content team.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
      - [Provide ACL notes by Jan 27.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
      - [Share feedback from Avi on the recent call.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [Send the current CheckTat competitor list for review.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [Deliver the "track terms" sheet by Jan 30.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Demo CheckTat during the Jan 30 sync.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Implement the new internal content check process.](https://fathom.video/share/L2-Vaws_B3VEpMd4-nzaV1toVXCzMmXE?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
